'''Snorbals''' were grazing herd animals from the planet [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].<ref name="TRoD" /> They were found among the arid wastelands of their homeworlds. Snorbal were highly intelligent and docile creatures, rarely attacking other than to defend their herd. Their trunk had two 'fingers' at the end, allowing them to manipulate simple objects. Snorbal had a highly efficient digestive system.<ref name="SWG:S" /> The Snorbals were physically very similar to the [[Thune (creature)|thunes]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Snorbals appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
